title: U.S. tells all its embassies to ‘immediately’ review security after strikes
summary_full: The State Department order to review security at “ALL posts worldwide” follows persistent attacks on U.S. embassies, with almost 300 reported in Iraq alone.
summary_public: The State Department order to review security at “ALL posts worldwide” follows persistent attacks on U.S. embassies, with almost 300 reported in Iraq alone.

IQ.label: neutral
IQ.evidence: persistent attacks on U.S. embassies, with almost 300 reported in Iraq alone
